posts.caption:
Duck, duck… GOOSE 🪿✨

These vintage Avon geese measuring spoons just waddled their way into the shop and we are OBSESSED. From their sweet little faces to that classic retro packaging, they’re giving full cozy kitchen nostalgia.

Perfect for display, gifting, or actually measuring out your next masterpiece (because yes, they’re functional AND adorable).

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it 🍀
🛍️ Shop now at hiraethhaven.com

Soft light, vintage charm, and a little bit of magic, these fairy lamps are the kind of pieces that don’t just decorate a space… they transform it.

Featuring:
🦋 Indiana Glass Co. Chantilly Fairy Lamps (timeless elegance with that delicate pressed pattern)
🌸 Westmoreland Pink Satin Glass Fairy Lamp (a soft, romantic glow you can’t replicate)

Each one carries that unmistakable Hiraeth Haven feeling… warm, nostalgic, and just a little enchanting.

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it 🍀
🛍️ Shop the collection: HiraethHaven.com

#hiraethhaven #hiraethhavenshop #hiraethhavenvintage #fairylamp #vintagefinds

✨ Golden hour… but make it glass ✨

This Viking Glass amber 6 petal covered candy dish is pure vintage glow, rich, warm, and just the right amount of statement.

Whether it’s holding your favorite sweets, jewelry, or simply catching the light on a shelf… this is one of those pieces that quietly steals the show.

And let’s be honest, are you actually putting candy in it… or just admiring it? 👀

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it 🍀
🛍️ Available now at HiraethHaven.com

#hiraethhaven #hiraethhavenshop #hiraethhavenvintage #vikingglass #vintagefinds

🦆 Guess what…?
…Duck butt. 😌

But make it vintage. ✨

This Napcoware mallard planter is bringing all the charm, soft hand-painted details, that perfect mid-century feel, and yes… a very cute little duck booty moment.

Whether you style it with greenery, use it as a catch-all, or just let it sit pretty on a shelf… this one’s guaranteed to make you smile every time you walk by.

Tell us honestly, are you here for the duck… or the duck butt? 👀

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it 🍀
🛍️ Available at HiraethHaven.com
